title: AI Image AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium Oriental tea brand campaign poster for Longjing green tea. Product Anchor: Show white porcelain gaiwan with green tea leaves and pale jade tea soup clearly and large enough to identify the tea category and material details. Muse: Adult East Asian fashion muse, quiet and restrained, posed gently lifting the gaiwan near her shoulder while turning slightly sideways; she supports the tea product and never hides it. Steam Motif: Tea steam becomes misty West Lake mountain lines and floating tea leaves, the main motion system of the image. Visual Style: Chinese ink-wash fashion illustration, warm xuan paper grain with ink bleeding at the edges, new Chinese restraint, delicate pale color, elegant whitespace. Palette: pale jade, rice paper white, ink grey, and soft tea gold. Typography: Brand name "清岚茶集" and copy "一盏春山入茶" in refined Chinese campaign style. Restrictions: No cheap costume-drama styling, no web-celebrity face, no tiny hidden product, no random text, no clutter.
